title: astelia neocaledonica
intro: Astelia neocaledonica, also known as the silver fern or Astelia, is a plant species native to New Zealand and parts of the Pacific Islands, characterized by its striking silver-green foliage. The leaves and rhizomes of Astelia neocaledonica have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. Astelia neocaledonica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine.
